title: Are Aliens Future Human Time Travelers?
summary: This interview explores the hypothesis that UAPs could be time machines operated by future humans. The discussion covers how craft capable of manipulating spacetime and gravity could enable travel across not just space but also time, suggesting recovered craft could be time machines.

key_claims.claim: UAPs may be time machines operated by future human time travelers
The US government is in possession of crashed craft that are time machines
Craft that can manipulate spacetime and create their own gravity could travel from other planets, solar systems, or times
